# MTLAttributeFormat.uchar4Normalized_bgra

**Case**

Four unsigned normalized 8-bit values, arranged as blue, green, red, and alpha components.

## Declaration

```swift
case uchar4Normalized_bgra
```

## Discussion

Use this representation when manipulating normalized 32-bit integer BGRA pixel formats.

## Pixel data types

- **MTLAttributeFormat.floatRG11B10**: One packed 32-bit value representing pixel data containing 11-bit float red and green channels, and a 10-bit float blue channel.
- **MTLAttributeFormat.floatRGB9E5**: One packed 32-bit value representing pixel data containing 9-bit float red, green, and blue channels, and a 5-bit float shared exponent channel.
